project_context.vibe: Boiler Room, Berghain, RA.co, contemporary arts gallery. Brutalist dark mode, anti-polish, highly functional editorial arts brand.
project_context.emotional_tone: Exclusive, raw, underground, disciplined, mysterious, confident.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none
rules.alignment: Strictly left-aligned or justified. Avoid center alignment to maintain an editorial, structural feel.

typography.installation: Ensure Clash Display, Manrope, and IBM Plex Mono are imported via Google Fonts or Fontshare.

rules.gradients: FORBIDDEN. Use stark flat colors, monochromatic fills, or subtle grain noise overlays.
rules.contrast: Maintain brutalist high contrast. Ensure all text meets WCAG AA at minimum.

surfaces_and_borders.border_radius: rounded-none (0px radius everywhere - buttons, inputs, cards, dialogs).
surfaces_and_borders.borders: Expose the structural grid. Use 1px borders (border-white/10) heavily on containers to create a wireframe, architectural feel.
surfaces_and_borders.shadows: No soft shadows. Use hard offset shadows (e.g., 4px 4px 0px #FF3333) for active/hover states, or keep it entirely flat.
surfaces_and_borders.headers: Solid background (#050505) with a harsh 1px border-b. NO transparent headers over content to preserve readability.

public_site.grid: Bento 'Tetris' Grid. Extreme asymmetry. Use wide gaps (gap-8 md:gap-12). Overlap text elements slightly over images for an editorial spread look.
public_site.padding: Generous. Use p-8 to p-16 inside large containers.

admin_dashboard.grid: High-Density Data Grid. Tight gaps (gap-4). Extremely functional and scanning-optimized.

scanner_pwa.layout: Viewport-locked (h-screen). Massive typography for immediate state recognition (VALID / INVALID). Camera feed dominates the screen.

components_strategy.buttons: Rectangular, sharp edges (rounded-none). Bold uppercase text. Default: border border-white/20 bg-transparent text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors.
components_strategy.inputs: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white p-4 rounded-none focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white focus:outline-none placeholder:text-zinc-600.
components_strategy.cards: border border-white/10 bg-[#0F0F0F] rounded-none p-6. No drop shadow.
components_strategy.dialogs: Use Shadcn Dialog logic, but strip Vercel styling. Make them stark rectangular boxes with a hard 1px border and solid #050505 background.
components_strategy.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

imagery_and_media.style: High contrast, dark, flash-photography style, moody.
imagery_and_media.overlays: Never use opaque blankets over hero images. Use max bg-black/40 or directional black gradients to ensure text readability while preserving the photo.

hero_upcoming_events.description: people partying inside room - use for Hero / Upcoming Events

past_projects_arts.description: woman in white dress dancing on stage - use for Past Projects / Mission

artist_profiles.description: Man wearing headphones, sunglasses, and leather jacket - use for Artist Profile cards

gallery_and_abstract.description: a crowd of people at a concert with their hands in the air - use for Gallery
blue and white light streaks - use for Ticket QR code modal background or scanner styling

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Abrupt, snappy, and mechanical. Avoid bouncy or slow fluid transitions. Feel like an industrial machine or a camera shutter.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Invert colors instantly (e.g., black text on white background) or use a hard offset translation.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-ins with no Y-axis translation, or harsh block-reveals.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for artist lineups or 'UPCOMING EVENTS' scrolling text. Use mono font, large tracking, and slow smooth drift.

libraries.toasts: sonner (customize to be square, black background, hard white borders)

general_ui_ux_guidelines: CREATE RAW, BOLD FRONTENDS: Do not converge toward generic SaaS aesthetics. The app should feel like a high-end European techno club or contemporary art zine.
DO NOT use 'transition: all'. Explicitly animate transform, opacity, or colors.
NEVER center-align the main App container. Left-align for editorial reading flow.
DO NOT use emojis for icons. Rely on typography and Lucide icons.
All JS files (not TSX). Write modern, clean React using JavaScript.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='buy-ticket-btn'.
Ensure contrast is brutal and clear. Text must not be lost against dark backgrounds.
DO NOT use fully transparent backgrounds on headers, overlays, or dropdowns. ALWAYS use solid #050505 or heavy blur with low transparency.
Use layered z-index hierarchy thoughtfully. Elements should feel like architectural layers.
Custom scrollbar: Hide the default gutter, use a thin, stark white or gray scroll thumb.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI exclusively using React functional components in JS (.js) files, not TypeScript.
Follow the typography strictly: Clash Display for headers, IBM Plex Mono for data/dates, Manrope for body text.
Style Shadcn components to remove their default rounded, soft looks. Apply rounded-none and hard borders.
Ensure the ticketing engine checkout flow (10min hold timer) looks hyper-functional and secure, using the mono font for the timer.
The admin dashboard must prioritize data density and quick edits over visual flair, but retain the dark brutalist theme.
The door scanner PWA should have massive touch targets and high-contrast color shifts (Green for valid, Red for invalid) for visibility in dark clubs.
